**Audit Reference:** ART14-AUDIT-2024-001

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

          All source entities used by act:PhysicianReviewSession_001

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Time:     09:01:52Z → 09:04:33Z  [161 seconds]
Actor:    ag:Physician_ID_P-7734
Action:   Entered clinical annotations:
          Annotation 1: "Nodule morphology consistent with AI finding 
                         but size estimate differs — AI: 8.2mm, 
                         my assessment: 6.5mm"
          Annotation 2: "Lab CRP elevated — possible inflammatory

          Annotation 3: "Prior 2022 report shows similar finding 
                         that resolved — AI did not flag this"
          Query Flag:   "Request second radiologist opinion on 
                         slice 23-27 before biopsy decision"
PROV:     ent:PhysicianAnnotations wasGeneratedBy act:PhysicianAnnotation
          act:PhysicianAnnotation wasAssociatedWith ag:Physician_ID_P-7734

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STEP 6 — PHYSICIAN DECISION (PARTIAL OVERRIDE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Time:     09:04:33Z → 09:04:41Z
Actor:    ag:Physician_ID_P-7734
Action:   Recorded decision: PARTIAL_OVERRIDE
          AI Recommendation:  "Immediate biopsy referral"
          Physician Decision: "Watchful waiting — repeat imaging 
                               in 6 weeks + second radiologist 
                               review of flagged slices"
          Rationale logged:   "Prior resolution history + 
                               inflammatory markers suggest 
                               non-malignant etiology. Size 
                               discrepancy noted. Biopsy deferred 
                               pending second opinion."
PROV:     ent:FinalDecision_001 wasGeneratedBy act:PhysicianDecision
          ent:FinalDecision_001 wasAttributedTo ag:Physician_ID_P-7734
          act:PhysicianDecision wasInformedBy act:PhysicianReviewSession_001
          ent:FinalDecision_001 wasDerivedFrom ent:AIRecommendation_v1
                                [relationship: PARTIAL_OVERRIDE]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
